name: Spark
description: Connect Claude to Spark - read-only access to your email, calendars, meetings, and contacts.
long_description: Give Claude read-only access to Spark on macOS so it can answer questions about your workspace. Search and browse emails, list folders, read full threads with bodies and attachments, look up contacts, check calendar events, find mutual availability with teammates, and review meeting transcripts with summaries and notes. Tools are discovered dynamically from the running Spark Desktop app. Claude cannot send mail, post comments, or change anything in your inbox - write access will be added in a later release.

tools.name: accounts
tools.description: List all configured email accounts with their calendars, teams, and shared inboxes

tools.name: emails
tools.description: List emails with metadata, pagination, and Gmail-style filters

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search emails by topic using keyword and semantic matching

tools.name: thread
tools.description: Read a full email thread with headers, bodies, and attachments

tools.name: events
tools.description: List calendar events for a time range

tools.name: availability
tools.description: Find free time slots for scheduling

tools.name: contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name or email

tools.name: team
tools.description: Show team info, members, and assignments

tools.name: meeting
tools.description: Read a meeting transcript summary, transcript, and notes
